description: Generated Shopify Admin REST Products read-only OpenAPI MCP catalog manifest.

notes: Official Shopify dev docs Admin REST API "Product" resource reference: https://shopify.dev/docs/api/admin-rest/latest/resources/product

Shopify does not publish a first-party OpenAPI/JSON document for the Admin REST API; only community-maintained mirrors exist. This manifest pins the official documentation source used for the catalog entry, matching the precedent set by the Salesforce entry in this catalog.
Admin REST API version referenced: 2026-07 (current stable quarterly release as of retrieval date).
Shopify's Admin REST API was deprecated for new public apps as of 2025-04-01 in favor of the GraphQL Admin API, but REST remains officially documented and supported for custom/private apps.
The committed manifest selects read-only Shopify Admin product list/get operations only.

process: Run pnpm build/test scripts only inside OpenShell-backed MXC isolation
Run node only as invoked by generated project package scripts inside OpenShell-backed MXC isolation
